title: Translate vetted oral rehydration for diarrhea guidance into Brazilian Portuguese
context: Community health workers need vetted oral rehydration for diarrhea guidance in Brazilian Portuguese. Use a vetted public-health source (e.g. WHO/MoH); verify the source licence permits translation/derivatives and record it — do NOT assume CC-BY. Include the required source attribution and any mandated translation disclaimer.
objective: Produce an accurate Brazilian Portuguese translation of vetted oral rehydration for diarrhea guidance, preserving medical terminology.
acceptanceCriteria: Reviewed by a qualified Brazilian Portuguese-speaking reviewer (risk-tier: medium)
Source licence verified to permit translation + attribution/disclaimer recorded (not relicensed as CC-BY unless the source allows)
